question_text: Which of the following correctly defines speed?

options.label: A
options.text: The rate at which an object changes direction

options.label: B
options.text: The distance travelled divided by the time taken

options.label: C
options.text: The force acting on an object

options.label: D
options.text: The total distance an object has travelled

explanation: Speed is a measure of how fast something is moving, calculated by dividing the distance travelled by the time taken. The other options describe different physics concepts.
